items.title: A Nation Going Dark
items.summary: The United States has choked off Cuba’s fuel supply, plunging the already impoverished island into an acute energy crisis.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Cuba hit by protests, blackouts amid oil shortage
items.summary: Cubans lit fires in Havana’s streets to protest electricity blackouts.
